user_task_description: This workbook contains a flat program outline that has section rows and detail rows, but no usable hierarchy in Excel's outline structure.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: On the `Program Outline` sheet, make rows `4`, `7`, and `10` the top-level section rows and group the following detail rows under each section using Excel row outlining, without changing the row order.
atomic_scope: Only hierarchy editing is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx workbook with row grouping / outline hierarchy applied.

inspired_by.title: Making recipe tree chart but having trouble formatting and automating it

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The hierarchy is visually implied but not structurally encoded
- The task requires identifying the correct parent-child row boundaries
- A correct result changes outline structure rather than rewriting content
